zh.lifeSummary: Joan Langford是Sir Nicholas Langford的女兒，於1290年出生在英國德比夏爾隆福德。她於1313年與Sir William d'Isney III在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1328年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾頓 迪士尼享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Langford是Sir Nicholas Langford的女儿，于1290年出生在英国德比夏爾隆福德。她于1313年与Sir William d'Isney III在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1328年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾頓 迪士尼享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Langford was born in 1290, in Longford, Derbyshire, England as the daughter of Sir Nicholas Langford. She married Sir William d'Isney III in 1313, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1328, in Norton Disney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Langford est née en 1290, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Nicholas Langford. Elle a épousé Sir William d'Isney III en 1313, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1328, à Norton Disney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Langfordは1290年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードでSir Nicholas Langfordの娘として生まれた。1313年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでSir William d'Isney IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1328年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノートン ディスニーで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Langford(은)는 1290년 영국 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 Sir Nicholas Langford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Sir William d'Isney III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르턴 디스니에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Langford родилась в 1290 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия. Её отца звали Sir Nicholas Langford. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William d'Isney III в 1313 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1328 г. в местности нортон дисни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
